scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @mintgallery/web" "npm run dev -w @mintgallery/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mintgallery/server && npm run build -w @mintgallery/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mintgallery/server && npm run test -w @mintgallery/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mintgallery/server && npm run typecheck -w @mintgallery/web
